name: Worldwide Webb Acquisition Corp. Class A Ordinary Share
summary: Worldwide Webb Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company focuses on businesses in the metaverse and web3 sectors, but may pursue an initial business combination target in any industry or geographic location. The company is headquartered in New York, NY.
